name: FLYEXCLUSIVE INC.
business: flyExclusive is a premier owner and operator of curated private aviation experiences, offering jet club membership, fractional ownership, and MRO services. The company generates revenue from charter flights, membership fees, and aircraft maintenance services.

exposures.sentence: flyExclusive is a premier owner and operator of curated private aviation experiences dedicated to surpassing passenger expectations for quality, convenience, and safety.
During the fourth quarter of 2023, we began the process of modernizing our fleet.

catalysts.event: Volato Agreement term extended to September 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: the term of the Volato Agreement was extended to the sooner of (i) September 1, 2026, (ii) the consummation of the asset purchase agreement applicable to the Asset Options, subject to an exercise of either of the Asset Options or (iii) the consummation of the merger (or any substantially similar transaction) of Volato and M2i Global, Inc. (the Volato Merger) pursuant to an Agreement and Plan of Merger among them, dated as of July 28, 2025, subject to the exercise of the Merger Option.

catalysts.event: flyExclusive Option exercise date begins March 31, 2026
catalysts.sentence: The Volato Merger (as defined below), if consummated, would constitute a change of control under the Amendment, triggering the beginning of the exercise date of the flyExclusive Option as March 31, 2026.
